text:

Thanks to Threads + Gumroad + Claude.

this business is genuinely insane. 😭💸

and they don't ask me what time i woke up. 🤍

DIGITAL PRODUCTS LITERALLY PAID OFF MY DEBT.

THREADS + GUMROAD + CLAUDE.

DON'T LET ANYONE TELL YOU IT'S TOO LATE 😭😭💸
